files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+# ``Swiftdansi``
+
+Markdown to ANSI renderer for Swift.
+
+## Overview
+Swiftdansi renders GitHub-flavored Markdown for terminals with wrapping, tables,
+code blocks, themes, and OSC-8 links.
+
+## Topics
+
+### Rendering
+- ``render(_:options:)``
+- ``createRenderer(options:)``
+- ``strip(_:options:)``
+
+### Configuration
+- ``RenderOptions``
+- ``Theme``
+- ``ThemeName``
